messages.content: I need an SVG of a adventurous pelican on a gray bicycle. Give the pelican beige feathers with a large gold-yellow beak and pouch. Include a simple ground line.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">

  </g>
  <g id="main-scene" transform="scale(1.0) translate(2.4,2.4)">
  <g id="bicycle">
  <g id="wheel-rear">
    <circle id="wheel-rear-tire" cx="119.4" cy="351.7" r="65.3" fill="none" stroke="#333333" stroke-width="3.5"/>

  <g id="bike-frame">

      <circle id="eye-highlight" cx="242.8" cy="176.0" r="1.3" fill="white"/>
      <g id="beak">
        <path id="beak-upper" d="M 250.8 180.7 L 300.7 183.7 L 250.8 186.7 Z" fill="#f9a825" stroke="#f57f17" stroke-width="1.4"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <g id="legs">
      <line id="leg-upper-right" x1="223.0" y1="280.0" x2="229.1" y2="295.2" stroke="#f9a825" stroke-width="3.0" stroke-linecap="round"/>

      <line id="leg-upper-left" x1="223.0" y1="280.0" x2="234.0" y2="316.7" stroke="#f9a825" stroke-width="3.0" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <line id="leg-lower-left" x1="234.0" y1="316.7" x2="224.9" y2="363.3" stroke="#f9a825" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <ellipse id="foot-left" cx="224.9" cy="365.3" rx="7" ry="3" fill="#f9a825" stroke="#f57f17" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    </g>
    <g id="arms">
      <line id="arm-right" x1="235.5" y1="251.6" x2="321.8" y2="290.9" stroke="#c9b99a" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  </g>
</svg>
